creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
I can confirm this and I confirm this strange behaviour on several different mainboard vendors (ASUS, Fujitsu, Dell) and on several generation of Intel x86 derived silica (SandyBridge, IvyBridge and Haswell, all XEON with >= 6 physical cores). The systems are strange under VBox with either classical MBR boot and UEFI boot (as available).

In our case, the guest (Win7 pro 64bit) is responding extremely slow and the mousepointer is jumpy as hell and unusable.
